title: praravinia lucbanensis
intro: Praravinia lucbanensis, also known as Lucban tree or Philippine Praravinia, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Praravinia lucbanensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of pain and infection. Praravinia lucbanensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and in some cases, it is used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
